role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and language (English) on the water tower.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and road infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified tree species (Tulip Poplar) and vegetation profiles.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings (double yellow) and utility pole styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure aesthetics and camera generation details.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (water tower, double yellow lines, specific trees) that strongly supported the correct answer and effectively ruled out competitors like Canada and France.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified English text on the water tower.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the double yellow lines, water tower, and deciduous forest.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the broadleaf deciduous nature of the trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the wooden poles and road markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific style of the water tower and poles.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United States.
